name: Souper Baked Sandwich
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Herb Stuffing Cubes; Not Mix
10 3/4 oz Cream of Mushroom Soup; 1 Can
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Cook and stir the meat, onion, and celery in a large skillet until the meat is brown. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
3. Drain off any excess fat.
4. Stir in the salt.
5. Arrange the stuffing cubes in a greased baking pan (9 X 9 X 2 inches or 11 3/4 X 7 1/2 X 1 3/4 inches).
6. Top with the meat mixture.
7. Beat together the milk, eggs, soup, and mustard.
8. Pour over the meat in the baking pan.
9. Sprinkle the cheese evenly on top.
10. Bake uncovered until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean, about 30 to 40 minutes.
11. Let cool for 5 minutes before cutting into squares and serving.
